questionHtml: Main sequence stars are in equilibrium under the action of forces. Outline how this equilibrium is achieved.
markschemeHtml:
photon/fusion/radiation force/pressure balances gravitational force/pressure

gives both directions correctly (outwards radiation, inwards gravity)

 

OWTTE

[2 marks]
